title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Jetking - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Jetking - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Jetking, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jetking:
Jetking is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jetking!
